facts.title: Emergency Numbers
facts.detail: Police 112, fire or ambulance 119, medical information 1339.

facts.title: Visa Types
facts.detail: Common study, training, job-seeking, employment, and residence categories.

facts.title: Voltage
facts.detail: Type C and Type F plugs are commonly used.

facts.title: Internet
facts.detail: High broadband and mobile coverage in most urban areas.

facts.title: Public Transport
facts.detail: T-money and mobile transit cards are widely used.

facts.title: Healthcare
facts.detail: International students and residents may be required to enroll.

facts.title: Banking
facts.detail: Many banking and phone services become easier after Alien Registration Card issuance.
